---
title: "Test Article"
author: "Aiden Ross"
date: "02/25/26"
draft: true
draft-mode: unlinked
format: 
  html:
    theme: cerulean
---
# Rcpp usage

## Simple method 

```{r}
Rcpp::cppFunction('
long long square(long long value){
  
  return value * value;
}')

square(10)
```

## Test global vars cpp


```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(Rmpfr)

precBits <- 1e3

precBits
```

```{r}
pi_mpfr <- Const("pi", precBits)

pi_mpfr

```
